ddls:
CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was held */,
  "schedule_length" INTEGER /* Length of the championship schedule */,
  "series_score" TEXT /* Score of the championship series */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "finalist_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finalist team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the championship was held */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_finalist_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("finalist_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championship_teams" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team in the championship (e.g., champion, finalist) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championship_players" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the championship */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the championship */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Summer League, Playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championship_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Best Coach) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_awards_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES championship_awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the trade */,
  "other_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the other team involved in the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "players_traded" TEXT /* List of players traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_other_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "free_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "free_agent_date" TEXT /* Date the player became a free agent */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's contract (e.g., signed, unsigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
